# BARL: Broadcast Assistant for Rocket League

> BARL is a free Rocket League broadcasting overlay tool. It adds an automated series score tracker, real-time team boost meters, and customizable team names and logos to any stream. Compatible with OBS Studio, Twitch, YouTube, and all major streaming platforms.

## Product

- [BARL Overview](https://lndrlndr.github.io/BARL-Overlay/): Full feature overview of BARL with video demos
- [BARL Product Page](https://lndrlndr.github.io/BARL/): Detailed feature list, screenshots, and video demonstrations
- [Download BARL](https://lndrlndr.github.io/BARL_App/): Download the latest BARL installer for Windows

## Features

- Free overlay with automated series score tracking
- Real-time team boost meters extracted directly from Rocket League (ultra-low latency)
- Customizable team names and logos via a Control Panel
- Works while spectating, playing yourself, or watching replays
- Hide or reposition team logos for a minimalist look
- Premium plan: community-designed overlay themes and full design customization

## Optional

- [CARL2: Analysis Tool](https://lndrlndr.github.io/): Companion replay analysis and coaching tool for Rocket League
- [Custom Overlays Portfolio](https://lndrlndr.github.io/portfolio/): Custom-made broadcast overlays for pro teams and tournaments
- [Contact](https://lndrlndr.github.io/Contact/): Contact LNDRLNDRLNDR
